base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of walkers — a character from 1989 populous. Walker units — villager/settler/warrior/knight at 4 upgrade tiers × 4 directions × good+evil palette. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
